person_name: James the Just, first Bishop of Jerusalem
person_name_full: James the Just, first Bishop of Jerusalem
notes: First Bishop of Jerusalem, known as James the Just, an early Christian leader and martyr.

docs.title: Ecclesiastical History, Book 2
docs.author: Eusebius
docs.excerpt: Oh! The just man is also in error .' And they fulfilled the Scripture written in Isaiah, 'Let us take away the just man, because he is troublesome to us: therefore they shall eat the fruit of their doings.' 16.

docs.title: Contra Celsum, Book 1
docs.author: Origen
docs.excerpt: … punishment for the death of James the Just , who was a brother of Jesus (called Christ), — the Jews having put him to death, although he was a man most distinguished for his justice .
